canonical_name: the friend and benefactor of our good King Arthur
the nun who had guided her
the best and the most Christian of all kings
the girls in the House of Maidens
her own maidens in the House of Maidens
one of her own young priestesses
that church where the ancient Christians worship
that church where the ancient Christians worship must stand on this very spot
a veiled woman crowned with a halo of light; and in her arms she bore a child
the ancient Christian brotherhood in Avalon
those who have need of a sign in this world
the old path by the shore
